description: We can supply a minimal example and formal verification. For N = 2^16, the fragment of the GPU kernel and its formal correctness proof (attached in supplementary material) demonstrates per-denominator coverage. As requested, the per-chunk output for d in [1, 65536] is provided as bitset files, and copies of the computed Merkle root for the full range. This can be reproduced on commodity hardware in 3.2 hours (Intel i7, GTX 1060).
action_taken: We can supply a minimal example and formal verification. For N = 2^16, the fragment of the GPU kernel and its formal correctness proof (attached in supplementary material) demonstrates per-denominator coverage. As requested, the per-chunk output for d in [1, 65536] is provided as bitset files, and copies of the computed Merkle root for the full range. This can be reproduced on commodity hardware in 3.2 hours (Intel i7, GTX 1060).
